title: Assistant Store Manager - Landmark Group India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Landmark Group India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Landmark Group India in Raipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Landmark Group India:
Landmark Group India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Group India!
